case_title: COURTNEY K. HALL VS. JOHN DALY BOULEVARD ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VNATREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
